description: Deal Room — Secure document sharing for M&A/succession

tasks.title: Deal Room Service
tasks.prompt:
Implement Deal Room (M5.5) in the Transaction Service as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-5.5.

Add endpoints:
  POST /api/tx/deals — create deal room (DEAL# META item)
  GET /api/tx/deals — list user's deal rooms
  GET /api/tx/deals/{dealId} — get detail (participant only)
  POST /api/tx/deals/{dealId}/participants — add participant (seller/buyer/advisor role)
  DELETE /api/tx/deals/{dealId}/participants/{userId} — remove
  POST /api/tx/deals/{dealId}/documents — generate pre-signed S3 upload URL for direct upload
  GET /api/tx/deals/{dealId}/documents — list documents
  GET /api/tx/deals/{dealId}/documents/{docId}/url — generate pre-signed download URL
  GET /api/tx/deals/{dealId}/audit — audit trail

S3/MinIO: documents stored under deals/{dealId}/ prefix. Pre-signed URLs for direct client upload/download (no file data through the API).
Audit: every action logged as AUDIT# items in snapp-tx.
Access control: only participants can access. Removing a participant immediately revokes.

Integration tests: create deal room, add participants, upload document (via pre-signed URL to MinIO), list documents, download, verify audit trail, verify non-participant blocked.
tasks.done_when: Deal room CRUD works. Document upload/download via pre-signed URLs to MinIO. Audit trail. Access control. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Deal Room UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement Deal Room UI using MudBlazor as specified in M5.6.

1. Pages/DealRoom/List.razor (/deals):
   - MudTable of user's deal rooms: name, status MudChip, participant count, document count, created date
   - MudButton 'Create Deal Room'

2. Pages/DealRoom/View.razor (/deals/{dealId}):
   - MudTabs: Overview | Documents | Participants | Activity
   - Overview: MudCard with deal name, status, creation date
   - Documents: MudTable (filename, uploaded by, date, size), MudButton 'Upload Document' → MudFileUpload component that gets pre-signed URL and uploads directly to MinIO/S3
   - Participants: MudList with MudChip roles (Seller/Buyer/Advisor), MudButton 'Add Participant' (MudDialog with user search + role selector)
   - Activity: MudTimeline of audit log entries

3. MudFileUpload integration: get pre-signed URL from API, upload file directly to S3/MinIO from browser, notify API of completion.

4. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Deal room list, detail with tabs, document upload/download, participant management, audit timeline. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 13 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 13. Run all tests. Walkthrough: create deal room, add participants, upload document, download document, verify audit trail, verify access control. Write .claude/reports/sprint-13-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Deal room functional. Validation report written.
